chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-8626 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case 07.05.2025 This case was lastly fixed on 25.01.2018, whereafter has not been persuaded by petitioner or his counsel. Today also no one is present. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
